It's still a room with nothing in it.
If she passes the audition, she could move to a better room.
She doesn't seem to care much, but there's no room less suited for her.
The owner of the room
isn't visible,
but that's actually better for me. I don't have a good impression of him.
The only thing in the room is a single bed, and just a table and chair. Is she really living with just this?
It seems like the audition is over, and she no longer has anything to stress about. She looks fresh today.
Somehow, even in this room, which is completely out of place in her world, she doesn't feel out of place.
Could it be her talent as an actress that allows her to blend into any scenery?
Alone in the room,
Waiting for his return must be tough for a 16-year-old girl.
Detective, have you talked to her biological parents?
No, I haven't done that yet.
Are you really that busy, Detective?
Not really, but...
If it takes too long, she might change her mind.
Hurry up and decide! It's painful to wait.
Isn't she here today either?
The audition is technically over, but she seems to have gone somewhere. It's cruel to leave such a cute girl behind, right?
She might be angry.
Because she had to audition for that band.
That's not true. I think it was a good experience for him in any case.
I wish she could think that way.
I wonder when she'll come back.
Does Gloria not know this place?
She probably doesn't, right? I haven’t told her, plus it’s different from where...
...she lived before.
It's meddlesome, but if you have something to say to her, it's better to say it clearly for both of your sakes.
I'd do that if she was someone I could talk to.
But our relationship is a bit delicate.
Let's stop talking about Gloria.
I'm really tense. It's terrible that I still haven't heard from her.
Sorry, things have been a bit chaotic.
Ah, this is going to make me sick!
Hurry and decide! It's painful to wait.
What if I found out my mother was none other than Meryl?
Shin.
What would Di do? Would he still quit his job?
I haven't seen him lately.
Why is he not around even after the audition is over?
I can't imagine they're having a fight.
With Gloria,
there seems to be a gap I'm not aware of. Is that why
they said they're quitting their job?
If things aren't going well with Gloria, they should look for another agent. It's such a waste to ruin their career.
Meryl is
not saying good things about them.
It might be unreasonable to introduce them without any background knowledge.
When Meryl and
they meet, what kind of impression will they get from each other?
Make sure to contact me soon.
